headline: Piper Sandler Downgrades Nike to Neutral With a $50 Target: Can the Swoosh Find Its Footing Again?
summary: Nike (NYSE:NKE) stock has been one of the market’s most painful stories in 2026, and Piper Sandler just made its skepticism official. The firm cut Nike from Overweight to Neutral on Friday, April 10, setting a price target of $50 — a signal that the turnaround timeline may be longer and harder than the bulls ... Piper Sandler Downgrades Nike to Neutral With a $50 Target: Can the Swoosh Find Its Footing Again?

headline: Piper Sandler downgrades Nike, questions whether athleisure boom has peaked
summary: Investing.com -- Piper Sandler cut Nike shares to neutral with a $50 price target in a note on Friday, arguing that the athletic footwear giant faces a potentially saturated athleisure market, a shrinking Classics business and insufficient product innovation to fill the revenue void.

headline: Nike’s Hispanic Soccer Push Tests Community Strategy After Share Price Slump
summary: Nike, Inc. (NYSE:NKE) has entered a multi year partnership with Alianza and Unisport to support Hispanic soccer players and communities in the U.S. The collaboration will focus on grassroots soccer in eight U.S. cities, delivering programs, branded gear, and expanded visibility for aspiring players. The initiative is positioned as a key move in strengthening Nike’s connection with a growing Hispanic consumer base and local soccer ecosystems. For investors watching NYSE:NKE at a current...
